defs: Penal retribution; punishment for crime or offense; the suffering in person or property which is annexed by law or judicial decision to the commission of a crime, offense, or trespass.
The suffering, or the sum to be forfeited, to which a person subjects himself by covenant or agreement, in case of nonfulfillment of stipulations; forfeiture; fine.
quotes: The penalty and forfeit of my bond.

notes: ☞ The term penalty is in law mostly applied to a pecuniary punishment.
